programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Pyramid Library. Just as Tish is due to meet her mum at the end of a library trip, she realises she needs help finding a book about pyramids.
Hippity Hoppity, Voosh. Children's animation. Bing and Sula are playing a vooshing game with their favourite toys. They throw them into the air to see how high they can fly.
I Spy. Preschool series. The voice trumpet leads a game of I Spy where the Teletubbies have to spot things with different colours - purple, green, yellow and red.
Swapsy. Tee thinks his skateboard is the best toy in the world, until he sees Tomo's remote-controlled truck. The pair swap toys, but Tee soon wants his skateboard back.
Wishing Tree. Evil Pea blows all the lanterns away during the Lantern Festival. Supertato struggles to get them all back and needs Broccoli's help to save the day.
Accident. Bing has a broken arm, making all of his usual activities hurt - even drinking juice!
Got Your Goat. How hard can it be to pick one plant at the top of a mountain with Mojo's chopper top? Pretty hard when there's a hungry goat who wants that plant even more than they do!
What's Hot. The Squirrels build a bug home, the Penguins tell us what's hot, and Norrie sings a song.
The Round Up Badge. The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and his old pal Rodeo Horse, who teaches them how to be cowhands and earn their Round Up Badges!
Tradies. Bluey and Bingo spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard.
Grandad. When Bluey and Bingo visit Grandad, he takes them on an adventure into the bush.
Go Jet Academy: Rainbow. Grandmaster Glitch tries to make his own rainbow but creates a huge rain storm instead.
The Tale of the Seed Snatch. Animated series. When Mr McGregor fills a bird table with sunflower seeds, Squirrel Nutkin becomes dangerously obsessed with raiding it.
Mudflat Mission. The Octonauts help rebuild some mudflats while reuniting a lost bird with its flock.
One. The animated adventures of friends who can always count on each other. Learn all about the number 1 with Numberblock One.
Din. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. D is ready to rock - he has his drumsticks but nothing to bang on.
Give It Another Go Day. Love Monster doesn't like the beach but tries to give it another go by looking for an aspect of it that he can enjoy.
Cats. Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!
Spinach. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the exceptional painter Spinach creating Kiwi's portrait, if Kiwi can keep still.
Squiggle. Bing and Coco are drawing Gilly a picture, but when Bing goes to say hello, Charlie does a big squiggle on Bing's drawing! Gilly then shows them a game called 'squiggling!'.
Fox. Dee encourages a friend to say 'fox', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see a red fox, a creeping fox, a fast fox and a furry fox!
Wibble Blobs. Lu refuses a snack that turns out to be yummier than she'd imagined.
Cherry's News. Cherry starts broadcasting news to Fine Forest.
More About Collecting. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos watch children collecting shells on a beach and decide to help. Later, they collect the Robot's nuts and bolts.
Fruity Fun. Justin and friends go fruit picking, and Aunt Polly judges the Fabulous Fruit Competition.
Breakfast. Preschool series. The Teletubbies wake up and can't decide whether to have tubby custard or tubby toast, so they have both!
Rough. Giovanna and Baby Bear invite babies and their grown-ups to explore objects that feel rough through discovery, play, song and story. Babies and grown-ups at home can join in too!
Picnic. Elsee joins her friend Ellie-Mai in the park for a picnic and a game of I-spy.
Colours. Isla and Abbie join Aaron to discover all the amazing spring colours bursting out around the city garden - but what will they find?
Teddy Bears' Picnic. It's the annual Teddy Bear Party, but before that, a toadstool pot, some paper cup critter puppets and a teddy bear box are created in attic.
Split's Sprout. When a seedling resembles Split's signature sprout, the Pea-Rex vows to protect it.
Bike. At the park, Bluey is struggling to learn how to ride her bike. But as she and Dad watch her friends determination with their own tasks, Bluey is inspired to give it another try.
The Topiary Badge. After seeing Duggee's topiary skills, the Squirrels are keen to try it out for themselves.

programmes.show_name: Hey Duggee: Top of the Pups
programmes.show_description: Heads, Shoulders, Knees and Toes. A Hey Duggee take on the classic Head, Shoulders, Knees and Toes tune, sung by Lord Fingal, Hedgley, the Old Deers and Eugene.
Waterfalls and Spooky Tag Walk. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers squelch in the mud and find a waterfall on a walk to play a spooky game!
Audrey Goes to the Farm. Audrey visits a farmyard and gets to feed some of the animals. Like any good farmer, she enjoys a cuddle with a baby goat before heading off on a tractor ride!
Diellza's Kosovan Stuffed Peppers. Diellza's recipe from Kosovo is peppers stuffed with rice, fresh vegetables and paprika.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Lizards. Chantelle helps look after lizards while Rory and Sandy make lizard camouflage art.
Mission: Train Station. Guide dog Kika must use her supersight to help Dr Amit catch a train to the city.
Eland and Colobus Monkey. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's elands and colobus monkeys.
Waffle's Dog Family. Waffle feels left out of the Brooklyn-Bells' fun, so he sets off to find his doggy family.
Ruffled Feathers. Oona, Baba and Otto search for a special bird - the white egret!
I Just Want to Be Me. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The Small Potatoes sing a punk rock anthem about how wonderful it is to just be yourself.
The Music Box. Sonny thinks he has found a box of broken junk, but it actually contains parts of something very special. Can Yukee and her friends put all the pieces back together again?
The Get Indoors Badge. A weather warning from Duggee's barometer leads the Squirrels to round up the creatures.
Car. Preschool series about words. Dee encourages a friend to say 'car', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure, looking at lots of different kinds of cars.
Space Division. One Hundred assembles a Space Division to investigate a mysterious signal.
Prank. Educational fun. When A discovers a magic red nose, she gets up to all sorts of cheeky five-letter mischief.
On the River. Justin and his friends paddle a bell boat, and Mr Tumble goes duck spotting.
Fixing Things. Preschool series. The Teletubbies go on a Tubby Custard Ride and make a lovely custardy mess inside and outside Home Dome.
Patchwork Ladybird. Patchwork Ladybird has a problem: her dots are gone! Will the Patchwork Pals help her find them?
Raa Raa and the Night Noises. Animation set in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. The gang get lost in the dark while out looking for fireflies, but Raa Raa guides the way back home.
Imagine That. The trainees learn that with a little imagination any ordinary job can be extraordinary.
Episode 18. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. The Lost Pirate finds himself marooned on a desert island that looks a little bit like a sandpit.
Paraceratherium and Footprint. Preschool adventure series. Andy meets the paraceratherium - a giant mammal which is five times the size of a rhinoceros!
The Drawing Planet. The Game Catchers land on a very funny drawing planet to play hockey ball.
Red Rock Crabs. Animated deep sea adventures. When Shellington and the crew try to gather some skittish crabs who have drifted away from home, they get help from some old friends.
The Tale of Cotton-Tail's New Friend. Animated series. Peter must scour the woods and find his sister Cotton-tail before a hungry Old Brown does.
The Day Off Badge. It's Duggee's day off but the Squirrels show up to tell him about their adventures.
Popcorn's X-Ray Bad Day. Popcorn breaks the x-ray machine and does everything he can to fix it before Vida finds out.
Corn's Mutiny. When Evil Pea gets frozen in ice, Corn decides to take over and become Evil Corn.
Mission Memory. Weasy hits his head and loses his memory! Can the ducklings help him remember them?
The Way of the Woods. A camping trip with Preston goes very wrong when he won't let them use Mojo's tops. But camping Preston's way soon starts a fire. It's Mojo and Bo to the rescue!
Tradies. Bluey and Bingo spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard.
Slimy Sammy. Flutter buys a new fishy pet from slippery salesman Mervyn, but the Piripenguins get stuck in its gloopy slime. Can the friends find a solution to their sticky situation?
Featherwand. Bingo is armed with a magic featherwand that makes things incredibly heavy.
Andy and the Mischievous Dino. Andy embarks on an epic adventure to uncover the identity of a mysterious dinosaur.
Sponsored Waffle. Waffle, Simon, Doug, Evie and Ruby do a sponsored silence to raise money for the school.
The Bouncy Wish. Rafi's wish for trampoline feet makes bouncing fun, until it becomes too much. With her dads' help, she realises asking for support brings laughter, pancakes and hugs.
It's Time to Post a Picture. The internet goes down before JoJo can show Great Gran Gran a picture she's drawn.
Shallot Boat. Animation for preschool children. After a night of strong rain, the Shallots set sail on a seafaring adventure.
All Change Day. Stop-motion animation. Major Clanger is making too much noise in his workshop and Mother is fed up with it. She suggests they should swap jobs.
Up and Down and Upside Down. MeMo and BaBa have fun exploring up, down and upside down on the seesaw and as they play with the Yummies. What goes up, must come down!
The Ball. The ball bounces around the garden visiting one character after another. They all enjoy playing with it until it reaches Makka Pakka and his uff-uff blows it right away.
Jade Thirlwall - The Dress in the Window. Jade Thirlwall reads a beautiful story about a little boy who dreams of a special outfit.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Don't Be Sad. Tish, Cori and Tobby visit Jeffy's house, but she is unhappy due to a damaged toy.
Come On Charlie. Children's animation. Bing gets all his favourite games out to play with Charlie, but when Charlie arrives he doesn't want to play any of them.
This Way That Way. Preschool series. The Teletubbies go 'this way, that way' on a Tubby Car journey to the Hidey Hup. The Tubby Spinny goes 'this way, that way' too.
Kapow! Pew! Pew! Pew! Tee wants Mo to join in his game but discovers she can't make the right action noises.
Grape Kids' Super Camp. Supertato leads the Grape Kids at Super Camp, but Evil Pea takes over with her Ice Camp.
Puppet Show. Bing and Sula are doing a puppet show for Flop, Amma and Pando, and Coco wants to join in. But Bing's loud Biteysaurus isn't welcome, as he is hurting Sula's ears!
Cheesy Bang Bang. The cheese delivery race is on as Mojo and the racer top try to deliver food faster than Filo. But the competition gets too hot when an explosive souffle is on the table!
I'm Hungry. King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.
The Favourite Badge. The Squirrels learn what a favourite is but can't decide on their own choices.
Granny Mobile. Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale when a real grouchy granny shows up.
Dance Mode. After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo gets three chances to put Mum and Dad in 'dance mode'.
Go Jet Academy: Lightning Bolt Blackout. An electrical storm strikes Academy Island, and the Go Jetters are trapped!
The Tale of Dr Bobtail's Adventure. Animated series. When Squirrel Nutkin feels too poorly to move, the rabbits must sneak Dr Bobtail on to Owl Island.
Lost Bottlenose Dolphins. Two dolphins get stuck in a coastal saltwater lake during low tide.
Another One. The animated adventures of friends who can always count on each other. One joins forces with another One to make Two.
Dog. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. O is fascinated as G grows her green hair into a grassy garden.
Elder Kitten Day. Everyone is organising a surprise party for Elder Kitten, and Love Monster's job is to keep Elder Kitten busy while they get things ready.
Sticks. Bella and Lift play with a stick that makes the perfect magic wand. They visit Patch, who has a tasty recipe - sticky stick critters!
Parsnip. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Parsnip performing a jaw-dropping escape that would leave even Houdini speechless.
PJ Party. Bing is sleeping at Sula's house but has forgotten Hoppity!
Pyjamas. Dee encourages a friend to say 'pyjamas', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different pyjamas -  red pyjamas, banana pyjamas and even a pair of party pyjamas!
Down in the Grumps. Lu is determined to cheer Declan up because he is in a bad mood.
Building Friendship. Rebecca and Keith, Fine Forest's best friends, have fallen out. Fred calls the Piggies for help. Fixing a friendship is harder than building!
More About Down. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos watch two men carry some furniture down the stairs in a block of flats, then decide to try to help.
Under the Sea. Fishy fun with Justin and his friends as they visit an aquarium and meet a diver. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble in on the hunt for some underwater treasure!
Keep Fit. Preschool comedy and education. The Teletubbies feel tired after doing lots of keep-fit exercises but they are ready for action again after eating lots of Tubby Custard.
Red. Nigel and Baby Bear invite little ones and their grown-ups to explore objects that are red through discovery, play, song and story. Babies and grown-ups at home can join in too!
Bus. Elsee plays I-spy whilst on a bus adventure with her new friend Chase.
Sounds of the Garden. Novah, Nelly and Aaron enjoy the amazing sounds of the city garden.
Fairy in the Attic! Rebecca and Murphi make a house and a box dragon, but will they solve the dust mystery?
All by Myself. Ginger and the Peas help a stubborn baby Bokchoydactyl build a nest all by itself.
Bob Bilby. It's Bingo's turn to bring her kindergarten's Bob Bilby puppet home.
The A Cappella Badge. The Squirrels are inspired to learn how to sing a cappella style after hearing a famous bird quartet singing in a nearby tree.

programmes.show_name: Hey Duggee: Top of the Pups
programmes.show_description: Alphabet Song. Mrs Weaver raps the alphabet with Duggee and the Squirrels.
Lookout Tower and Beeping Bus. On a walk to the recycling point, Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers listen to the wind and beep like buses.
Sporty Audrey. Audrey flexes her sporting skills with a table tennis lesson and a family game of mini-golf. And she even teaches Mum some very bendy yoga! Join in!
Disa's Swedish Kardemummabullar. Disa is baking kardemummabullar, a sweet Swedish pastry flavoured with cardamom.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Moths. Chantelle sees one of the biggest moths while Rory and Sandy are spies in disguise.
Mission: Muddy Puddle. Meagaidh and Tom must rescue Joe and Kate, who are lost at the top of a really steep hill.
European Bison and Red-Billed Hornbill. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet bison and red-billed hornbills.
First Aid Waffle. Waffle's paw is hurt in Poodles' Class, so vet Jess trains Mr Nolan in doggy first aid.
Finding Bernie. Oona and Silky meet some 'scary' creatures and help Bernie get home safely.
We're All Potatoes at Heart. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. Potatoes from around the world celebrate the similarities and differences we all share.
Perfect Present. Everyone is bringing presents to the opening of Twinkle's zen garden, and Yukee wants to take something too.
The Pen Pal Badge. Duggee arranges for the Squirrels to write to some pen pals.
Bed. Preschool series about words. Dee encourages a friend to say 'bed', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure, looking at lots of different kinds of beds.
The Third Button. Numberblock Three has lost one of her red juggling ball buttons! Can detective Numberblock One help Three find it by telling the time?
Plusman. Educational fun. Plusman to the rescue! A new superhero arrives in Alphaland to save the day by joining words together.
Golf. Justin and a friend make a space rocket and play mini golf. Meanwhile, Lord Tumble attempts to teach Mr Tumble how to play golf, but things don't quite go to plan.
Being Quiet. Preschool fun from Teletubbyland. Tinky Winky can't sleep and goes outside to play so as not to wake the other Teletubbies. But his footsteps are noisy and wake them.
Patchwork Snake. The Patchwork Pals have a problem: Snake is coming by, but her visit is way too short! Will she find a way to make everybody happy?
Raa Raa Plays Do What I Do. Animation set in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. Raa Raa is playing a new game called Do What I Do with his friends, but a misunderstanding upsets Topsy.
Chug Encounters of the Train Kind. Look up in the sky! Is it a bird? A plane? No, it's Space Chuggers! Adventure ensues when the trainees prepare for a visit with Chuggers from outer space.
Episode 19. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. DIY enthusiast DIY Dan builds a birdbath for all the little garden birds.
Spinosaurus and Scan. Adventure series. Andy travels 100 million years back in time to meet the spinosaurus, a huge meat-eating dinosaur that is even bigger than the T-rex!
Well Done, Nina! The Game Catchers land on a mountainous planet to play the handkerchief challenge.
Sea Sponge. Animated deep sea adventures. A sea sponge that houses other sea creatures in its pores suffers from a mysterious illness, and Peso must figure out the cause.
The Tale of the Lost Ladybird. Animated series. When Peter accidentally loses Lily's ladybird, the rabbits embark on a dangerous chase to recover her precious pet.
The Big Day Out Badge. Duggee takes the Squirrels and their parents on an exciting mystery trip.
Pippen's Bad Breath. Vida and Popcorn's search for a mysterious stink in the koala family home leads to young Pippen receiving a much-needed lesson in flossing.
Home Swap. Evil Pea tricks Supertato into inviting her to stay. But as soon as she moves in, she takes over by completely freezing Tato Tower and Supertato.
Mission Party Time. The ducklings throw a 'no adults' party, so Weasy parties solo but makes a huge mess.
Nine-Legged Bill. Cap'n Gail's tall tale of a nine-legged octopus in Lake Swoppiton has everyone panicking. But Mojo and Bo wonder: is the story real, or is Cap'n Gail up to something?
Granny Mobile. Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale when a real grouchy granny shows up.
Piris, I Shrunk the Looph. Looph accidentally shrinks to a tiny size and must find a way to get her friends to help.
Squash. Bingo proves that big siblings don't always beat little siblings.
Andy and the Hatzegopteryx Display. Andy embarks on an epic adventure on Dino Island to meet the giraffe-sized Hatzegopteryx.
School Dog Waffle. The Brooklyn-Bells take Waffle to school to ask the headteacher if Waffle can visit class.
The Football Wish. Rafi wishes for giant goalie hands to save every ball but discovers true magic is believing in yourself.
It's Time to Catch the Bus. JoJo and Gran Gran miss their bus home, so the pair settle down to wait for the next one. But getting the bus isn't quite as simple as JoJo thinks it is...
Cake Decorate. Animation for preschool children. Cake decides to teach Sarah and Duck how to decorate with icing.
The Wols. Stop-motion animation. The Iron Chicken offers to look after Mother Wol's three little Wols without realising they can be quite the handful.
MeMo's Messy Painting. MeMo is frustrated with a messy painting. BaBa and friends help MeMo see its beauty.
Where Is the Pinky Ponk Going? Series for young children. Everyone in the Night Garden boards the Pinky Ponk for a special journey to see a magical flower.
Gaz Coombes - Octopants: The Missing Pirate Pants. Join Gaz Coombes on an underwater quest... for pirate underwear!
